title: phyllanthus prostratus
intro: Phyllanthus prostratus, also known as Mauboulan or Prostrate Phyllanthus, is a low-growing, herbaceous plant native to Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and acting as a natural diuretic, as well as possessing anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus prostratus can be found in the form of extracts, capsules, or teas, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
